$comment: Phase 4 risk extraction gold set. Used to measure risk extraction, classification, and severity labeling accuracy.

examples.text: We face significant disruption to our global supply chain which could adversely affect our manufacturing capabilities and result in major delays.
Changes in regulatory compliance requirements present a risk of moderate cost increases.
A severe security breach or cyberattack presents an existential threat and could impair our entire cloud service operations.
Increased local competition in secondary markets represents a minor risk of downward pressure on pricing.
We face a material risk of patent infringement lawsuits that could disrupt our core product sales.
